parameters-en.Gain: Controls the amount of gain applied to the signal.
parameters-en.Tone: Controls the overall tonal balance of the overdrive. Lower values are darker and higher values are brighter.
parameters-en.Presence: Adds a bit more high end sparkle.
parameters-en.Clipping: Selects the clipping mode. "Overdrive" has a touch of drive and compression. "Clean" is less compressed than "Overdrive" and is ideal for boosting your signal into an amp. "Distortion" provides even more drive and compression.
parameters-en.Gain Mod: The original pedal has different variations available, one with more gain ("Higher").
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the block.
parameters-en.Voltage: The original pedal was designed to be powered by a 9V power supply but could alternatively accommodate 18V, which would provide a bit more headroom. This is especially apparent when Clipping is set to "Boost" and Gain is turned up.
